data.title: Bloomberg: Trump nominates Michael Selig, chief legal counsel for the SEC's crypto task force, as CFTC chairman
data.description: According to Bloomberg, an anonymous government official revealed that President Donald Trump has nominated Michael Selig to serve as Chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). Selig served as Chief Counsel to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) Cryptocurrency Task Force and previously served as Assistant to SEC Chairman Paul Atkins. During this time, Selig worked to align the SEC and CFTC's approaches with various sectors of the financial and cryptocurrency industries. Earlier in his career, Selig was a partner in the asset management business of Willkie Farr & Gallagher.

The platform is called MultiSYG and it will be release in the first half of 2026 with a focus on institutions […]

data.title: Whale Receives 1,030 BTC After Three-Month Hiatus
data.description: According to PANews, a cryptocurrency whale has received 1,030 Bitcoin, valued at approximately $114 million, after a three-month period of inactivity. The transaction was monitored by Onchain Lens and originated from FalconX.

data.title: Tether to Launch US-Focused Stablecoin in December
data.description: According to PANews, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced plans to introduce a US-focused stablecoin, USAT, in December to comply with federal regulations. This new token will be issued by Tether America, a joint venture between Tether and the regulated U.S. cryptocurrency bank Anchorage Digital. Tether has invested in platforms like Rumble to expand its user base to 100 million Americans. Currently, Tether's USDT supply has reached $182 billion, maintaining its dominance in the stablecoin market, while the market size of Tether Gold has doubled this year.

data.title: Rumble partners with Tether to add Bitcoin tips for content creators
data.description:

data.title: Treasury’s TIPS market at risk after White House says there will be no October CPI
data.description:
The part of the US Treasury market that protects investors from rising consumer prices is now facing uncertainty after the White House said the October consumer price index (CPI) may not be released. This matters because Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) use CPI data to calculate how much interest investors are owed. Without those numbers, payments […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/treasurys-tips-market-at-risk/

data.title: Dogecoin Bears Tighten Grip, But This Support Zone Hints At A Potential Reversal
data.description:
Dogecoin is once again under pressure as bears tighten their hold, keeping the price pinned below key resistance levels. Despite the ongoing consolidation, one crucial support zone is beginning to show signs of strength, hinting that a potential reversal could be on the horizon if buyers step in at the right moment. Momentum Hinges On RSI and BTC Dominance Levels Umair Crypto, in his latest update on Dogecoin, noted that the meme coin is currently consolidating just beneath the 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA), forming what appears to be a clear bearish setup. According to Umair, the structure suggests that the price could soon face rejection from this critical moving average, a move that may trigger a decline toward the $0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-bears-tighten-grip/

data.title: Here is How Ripple’s Hidden Road Takeover Could Redefine Institutional Crypto — XRP Surges Past $2.50
data.description:
Ripple's strategic and often overlooked initiative, referred to as the "Hidden Road Takeover," has the potential to significantly transform the landscape of institutional cryptocurrency investments. This shift in strategy is evidenced by the remarkable surge of XRP, which has recently exceeded the $2.50 mark, indicating growing confidence among investors and institutions in the capabilities and future prospects of Ripple's technology and its associated digital asset. Such developments not only highlight the increasing acceptance of cryptocurrency in institutional portfolios but also suggest that Ripple's innovations could pave the way for a more integrated and mainstream adoption of digital assets in financial markets.
source: https://blocknews.com/here-is-how-ripples-hidden-road-takeover-could-redefine-institutional-crypto-xrp-surges-past-2-50/
